scene_description: Various items, including a snack bag, a plastic bottle, and a soda can, are placed on a gray surface.

candidates.rationale: One clear plastic bottle is lying horizontally near the center right of the table.
One metallic soda can is sitting upright on the bottom left of the table.

scene_description: A white countertop sits above wooden cabinets, holding electronics and a mug.

candidates.rationale: There are two silver horizontal handles mounted on the wooden drawers below the countertop.
Two small black rounded devices resembling wireless mice are visible on the countertop, one near the mug and one near the silver laptop.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned over a kitchen counter containing a box with packaged snacks, a bottle, and two woven placemats.

candidates.rationale: There are two small, brightly colored packaged snack bags sitting inside the cardboard box on the counter.
Two round, woven placemats are clearly visible on the speckled counter surface.

scene_description: A robot views a small collection of objects placed on a white circular table.

candidates.rationale: A single brown stuffed animal is lying fully visible on the right side of the table.
A single red and yellow Play-Doh container is visible near the base of the robot arm.

scene_description: A robotic arm views a white table containing four modeling clay tubs and a jar inside a plastic bag.

candidates.rationale: There are four distinct, unoccluded modeling clay tubs visible in the foreground (purple, yellow, pink/magenta, and orange).
Two of the four tubs are clearly purple or magenta/pink in color, distinct from the yellow and orange tubs.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned near a bed/sofa, overlooking a white cardboard box containing items.

candidates.rationale: One large white cardboard box is in the foreground, and one smaller brown package/box is situated immediately beside it.
One white card with text is sticking out of the large box, and one small black and white label is visible on the brown package next to it.

scene_description: A white robot arm is positioned over a cluttered white desk containing various objects, including books, boxes, and electronic devices.

candidates.rationale: Five distinct colored spherical objects (plastic balls) are visible inside the small patterned bowl.
Two red and black clamps are securing the mounting structure on the far left side of the desk.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned over a toy kitchen set containing various miniature cooking implements.

candidates.rationale: There are two small white and red toy spice bottles located on the stove top next to the red bowl.
Four matching white/grey handles are clearly visible on the front doors of the toy refrigerator section on the left.

scene_description: A close-up view shows a toy kitchen set with several play items resting on the counter and stove top, surrounded by lab equipment.

candidates.rationale: Six white and grey circular knobs are clearly visible on the front panel of the toy stove (four upper, two lower).
Two black and orange clamps are fixed onto the metal frame structure in the lower foreground.
